## DescendantsManager class

Class to manage descendants and their relative indices in the DOM. It uses `node.compareDocumentPosition(...)` under the hood

```typescript
export declare class DescendantsManager<T extends HTMLElement, K extends Record<string, any> = Record<string, any>> extends ExternalStore<{
    list: Descendant<T, K>[];
}> 
```
<b>Extends:</b> [ExternalStore](#externalstore) &lt;{ list: [Descendant](#descendant) &lt;T, K&gt;[]; }&gt;
